files.notes: This file contains three distinct lesson sections: Theology/Testimony, Literature (including Teachers Topic on Beatitudes and main lesson on Huckleberry Finn), and Social Service. Each section has clear subject matter boundaries and different weekly assignments as indicated in the content.
